# 📊 Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) & RFM Analysis

## 🔍 Project Overview

This project analyzes customer transaction data to identify high-value customers and potential churn risks using RFM (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) analysis.

## 🎯 Objectives

* Segment customers based on purchasing behavior
* Identify high-value (Champion) customers
* Detect At-Risk customers likely to churn
* Analyze revenue contribution by customer segments

## 🛠️ Tools Used

* Python (Pandas)
* Power BI
* SQL (conceptual)

## 📊 Key Insights

* A significant portion of revenue is generated by customers in the **At Risk** segment
* Customer behavior follows a skewed distribution where a small group contributes most revenue
* Retention strategies are more critical than acquisition

## 📈 Dashboard Features

* Customer segmentation visualization
* Revenue contribution by segment
* Interactive filtering using slicers
* Top products analysis

## 🚀 Business Impact

This analysis helps businesses:

* Improve customer retention
* Focus on high-value customers
* Prevent revenue loss

## 📁 Project Structure

* `data/` → cleaned datasets
* `src/` → Python scripts
* `powerbi/` → dashboard file

## 📌 Conclusion

RFM analysis reveals that retaining existing customers is more valuable than acquiring new ones, especially when high-revenue customers are at risk.
